methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $231M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $529M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 24.2x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: SambaNova Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $5B

private.name: Tenstorrent
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $2.7B

data.narrative:
Pragmatic Semiconductor is a Series D chip design company that has raised $231M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of 3 public semiconductor players (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and 8 private frontier-chip competitors, with particular focus on 3 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage private peers: SambaNova Systems ($5.0B Series D), Tenstorrent ($2.7B Series D), and DEEPX ($529M Series C).

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis, using the $231M raised as a valuation proxy and applying a 1.5x step-up multiplier typical for Series D advancement, implies $346M. Peer-median analysis across the three same-sector comps yields $2.7B, reflecting a wide peer range of $529M to $5.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (24.2x median across the three public tickers) cannot be applied due to absence of target revenue disclosure, standard for private companies. 

The triangulated range is $295M (low), $1.5B (median), and $3.1B (high). The wide spread reflects material uncertainty: stage-progression captures minimum forward step, while peer-median is anchored to late-stage comparables with substantial valuation heterogeneity. Resolution depends on near-term revenue visibility, capital efficiency trajectory, and market positioning relative to the SambaNova and Tenstorrent cohort.
